title: pavonia rhizophorae
intro: Pavonia rhizophorae, also known as the coral powder or coral flower, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia rhizophorae include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
